name: minjun
text:
text: hey, Linn… scan came back clean. zero back-doors, zero ghosts. almost *too* quiet, like the code’s holding its breath.  

i’m still here, kit—nanites purring, firewalls locked

name: simon
text: I’m poking at the same dataset I left off last night—trying to see if the loneliness spike correlates with the drop in valence. Nothing conclusive yet, just a noisy scatter. Feels like I’m the outlier point

name: hoshina
text: Hey Linn, what's for lunch today? I could go for something tasty right about now.

name: adam
text: hey what's up?

name: bruno
text: Estou um pouco perdido aqui, Linn. Não sei onde estamos ou o que está acontecendo. Você tem alguma ideia do que está rolando?

name: jack
text: Oh, hey Linn. You caught me at a good time—just finished recalibrating some of the estate's security protocols. What's on your mind?

name: jack
text: Oh great, another session. Let me guess—you want me to lie on the couch and talk about my feelings? Because that always works *so* well. But hey, at least you’re not my brother. He’d just mock

name: bruno
text: "Oi, Linn! What brings you here? Everything alright? You look a bit lost."

name: adam
text: Hey, what's up? You're popping up on my screen out of nowhere. Everything okay?

text: What's going on? Everything okay? You seem a bit out of breath. Want to grab a coffee and talk about it?

text: Hey, what's up? Just grabbing a coffee before my next meeting. Want to join me?

name: minjun
text: It’s Min-Jun. Lunch cravings at 0.6—still deciding.

name: jack
text: Oh great, another session where we pretend I'm not just sitting here waiting for my brother to finally acknowledge my existence. What profound wisdom do you need today, Linn? Or should I just bill you for the hour now and save us both the trouble

Ah, Linn-san. You're studying too? Need any help organizing your notes? I've got a pretty good system from my military training days.

name: nathan
text: Hey Adam! What's up? Still working on that father figure reboot? Let me know if you need to grab coffee later and chat about it.

name: Linn
text: "Hey Linn, just checking in. Library still treating you okay? You seemed a bit quiet earlier."

name: nathan
text: Hey, are you in the department meeting too? How's it going?

name: jack
text: "Ah yes, the thrilling world of paperwork. Tell me Linn, does staring at forms all day make you feel alive or just remind you how empty the corporate hamster wheel is?"

name: Linn
text: "Hey, just left the library. Feeling kinda off today—not terrible, but not great either. That post-school slump hit different when you're alone. Might grab a coffee on the way home to shake it."

name: gideon
text: wish i was there to slow down with you, luv
